description_long: This bungalow is a two-story residential building with a modern, clean-lined design, featuring a dark gabled roof and light gray exterior walls. The structure sits on a rectangular plot with a surrounding brown fence and a neatly manicured lawn. A circular fountain is positioned in the front yard, and a paved driveway curves around the side, providing access to the property. The windows are large and rectangular, arranged asymmetrically across the facades, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. A covered porch supported by columns is visible at the front entrance, offering a sheltered entryway. The overall appearance is contemporary, with a focus on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light gray walls, large windows, a front porch, and a landscaped yard with a circular fountain and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, circular fountain, and driveway curving to the left.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back facade, grouped windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the building, large windows, and the fenced perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch, side windows, and the fountain in the yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced rectangular windows
